title: Uranium Holds at $85 as AI Data Centers Go Nuclear
excerpt: Uranium miners are selling off hard while the commodity itself barely flinches, and that disconnect points to a specific pressure point that will determine w...
content_html:
Marc Guberti

Wed, July 22, 2026 at 6:03 AM EDT 4 min read

Quick Read

  • URA has dropped 18% in one month while spot uranium holds at $85, revealing a stark disconnect between miner equity prices and commodity reality.

  • Cameco, roughly 20% of URA's portfolio, has fallen 19% in a month and is the primary reason URA underperforms the underlying commodity.

  • Long-term utility contracts drive 80% of uranium volume and matter far more than spot prices for miner earnings and URA's path to recovery.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Cameco didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

The Global X Uranium ETF (NYSEARCA:URA) has taken a sharp turn lower even as the underlying commodity refuses to break. URA trades near $39, down nearly 18% over the past month and roughly 10% over the past week, while spot uranium has held near $85 per pound. That gap between what mining equities are pricing and what utilities are actually paying for U3O8 is the story of URA right now, and it frames what holders should be watching next.

What URA Actually Owns and Why the Selloff Stings

URA is the largest pure-play uranium ETF, giving investors exposure to miners, developers, and nuclear-fuel companies through a single ticker with a 0.69% expense ratio. The fund solves a real problem: retail investors cannot buy physical uranium easily, and single-stock miner risk is punishing. The tradeoff is that URA is heavily concentrated in a handful of names, with Cameco (NYSE:CCJ) setting the tone.

Even after the recent drawdown, the longer-term thesis is intact. URA is still up roughly 144% over five years and 277% over ten, driven by the same AI data center power thesis that pushed Cameco up more than 415% over five years. The one-year return of less than 1% tells you the easy money already ran.

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Cameco didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

The Macro Factor: Utility Contracting, Not Spot Prices

The single macro variable that matters most for URA over the next twelve months is the pace of long-term utility contracting, not the daily spot tick. Spot uranium prices only reflect roughly a fifth of global volume. The other 80% moves through multi-year contracts between miners and nuclear utilities, and those contract prices are what actually feed miner earnings.

Watch the UxC and TradeTech monthly reports for the long-term contract price. If that number crosses $90 per pound and stays there, expect URA's miners to be aggressive with new mine restarts and off-take announcements. If it drifts back toward $75, the AI-data-center narrative starts losing its financial backing. Check monthly. The EIA's Uranium Marketing Annual Report, which showed weighted-average delivery prices climbing steadily through 2024, is the free public benchmark most investors miss.

content_html_zh:
马克·古贝尔蒂

2026 年 7 月 22 日星期三，美国东部时间上午 6:03 阅读 4 分钟

快速阅读

  • URA 在一个月内下跌了 18%，而现货铀价维持在 85 美元，这表明矿商股价与大宗商品实际情况之间存在明显脱节。
  • Cameco 约占 URA 投资组合的 20%，一个月内下跌了 19%，这是 URA 表现不佳的主要原因。
  • 长期公用事业合同占铀产量的 80%，对于矿商收益和 URA 的复苏之路而言，其重要性远远超过现货价格。
  • 立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 Cameco 并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

尽管标的商品拒绝突破，但 Global X 铀 ETF (NYSEARCA:URA) 已大幅下跌。 URA 交易价格接近 39 美元，较过去一个月下跌近 18%，较过去一周下跌约 10%，而现货铀则维持在每磅 85 美元附近。 矿业股票的定价与公用事业公司实际为 U3O8 支付的价格之间的差距是 URA 目前的故事，它构成了持有人下一步应该关注的内容。

市建局实际拥有什么以及为何遭遇抛售

URA 是最大的纯铀 ETF，让投资者通过单一股票代码投资矿业公司、开发商和核燃料公司，费用率为 0.69%。 该基金解决了一个现实问题：散户投资者无法轻易购买实物铀，而单一股票矿商的风险正在惩罚。 代价是 URA 严重集中在少数几个名字上，而 Cameco (NYSE:CC​​J) 定下了基调。

即使在最近的回撤之后，长期论点仍然完好无损。 URA 在五年内仍上涨约 144%，在十年内上涨约 277%，这得益于推动 Cameco 在五年内上涨超过 415% 的相同人工智能数据中心实力论点。 低于 1% 的一年回报率告诉你，轻松赚钱已经跑光了。

立即行动：2010 年致电 NVIDIA 的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 Cameco 并未上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

宏观因素：公用事业合同，而不是现货价格

未来 12 个月对市建局来说最重要的单一宏观变量是长期公用事业合同的步伐，而不是每日现货报价。 现货铀价格仅反映全球产量的大约五分之一。 另外 80% 通过矿商和核电公司之间的多年合同进行转移，而这些合同价格才是矿商实际收入的来源。

观看 UxC 和 TradeTech 月度报告，了解长期合同价格。 如果该数字超过每磅 90 美元并保持在该水平，预计 URA 的矿商将积极重启新矿并发布承购公告。 如果价格重新回到 75 美元，人工智能数据中心的叙述就开始失去财务支持。 每月检查一次。 EIA 的铀营销年度报告显示，到 2024 年加权平均交付价格将稳步攀升，这是大多数投资者错过的免费公共基准。
